plugins.name: repokit
plugins.description: Keep your project's context in sync, then put it to work. dockit scans the codebase and generates living docs; onboard ramps up new developers from those docs; feedback-loop validates completed work against project conventions; agentkit generates project-specific AI agents that understand your custom code. The /repokit hub orchestrates the loop. Ticket creation lives in the sibling tikkit plugin.
